flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Temple College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Temple College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.2k vs 4.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Temple College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (83.0% → 67.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Temple College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.2k).
